transit.header: Morris and Essex Line rail service remains suspended in both directions between Morris Plains and Mount Arlington due to a downed tree across the tracks near Mount Tabor. Customers should visit www.nj
transit.description: Morris and Essex Line rail service remains suspended in both directions between Morris Plains and Mount Arlington due to a downed tree across the tracks near Mount Tabor. Customers should visit www.njtransit.com/ABC for alternate service information.
